<br>

### I N T E L L I G E N C E &nbsp; | &nbsp; S Y S T E M S &nbsp; | &nbsp; S T R U C T U R E
*An intersection of high-dimensional theory and practical architecture.*

<br>

<table width="900" border="0" cellpadding="20" cellspacing="0">
  <tr>
    <td width="50%" valign="top">
      <h4>KNOWLEDGE CARTOGRAPHER</h4>
      <p align="justify">
        Exploring the geometry of social networks through Graph Neural Networks. Focusing on sub-quadratic global tracking and hierarchical tokenization to map complex connections without the weight of traditional computation.
      </p>
    </td>
    <td width="50%" valign="top">
      <h4>SYSTEMS SYNTHESIZER</h4>
      <p align="justify">
        Constructing resilient full-stack environments. Translating abstract data requirements into centralized platforms that facilitate human interaction and automated infrastructure recovery.
      </p>
    </td>
  </tr>
</table>

<br>

---

<br>

### C O M P E T E N C I E S
*Defined by execution, not just tools.*

| ROLE | CORE DOMAIN |
| :--- | :--- |
| **Intelligence Architect** | Neural Graph Structures · Machine Learning Pipeline Design · Predictive Modeling |
| **Interface Engineer** | Full-Stack Synthesis · Interactive Application Logic · Responsive Design Systems |
| **Cloud Strategist** | Automated Infrastructure · S3/EC2 Orchestration · Dynamic Resource Recovery |
| **Technical Researcher** | Algorithmic Innovation · Formal Documentation · Semantic Data Retrieval |
